heading: ***FLOOD WATCH FOR NORTHERN NY AND CENTRAL AND NORTHERN VT THROUGH THURSDAY AFTERNOON******WINTER WEATHER ADVISORY FOR THE NORTHERN CHAMPLAIN VALLEY WEST IN NY NORTH OF RT. 3***Today
text: Sun, mixing with some clouds from the Adirondacks and Rt. 2 north later in the day. Highs ranging through the 60s, some 50s in northern NY and the St. Lawrence. Winds light, becoming southwest near 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Increasing clouds. A rising chance of rain showers from the Adirondacks and Rt. 2 north, possibly freezing rain near and north of the Quebec border. Lows in the 30s, near 30 far north, and 40 to 45 southwest. Winds northeast near 10 mph from the Adirondacks and Rt. 2 north, light and variable south.

heading: Wednesday
text: Some patchy freezing rain and sleet from the Adirondacks and Rt. 2 north early, then scattered showers. Steadier rain late. Highs in the upper 40s to mid 50s, some 60s from Bennington southwest. Winds from the Adirondacks and Rt. 2 north, southeast elsewhere 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.
